step1.title: Choose a Template
step1.subtitle: Select an approved message template for your broadcast.
step1.emptyDesc: Create a template in Settings first.

step2.title: Select Audience
step2.subtitle: Choose who will receive this broadcast.

options.allDesc: Send to every contact in your database
options.customFieldDesc: Filter by a custom field value
options.csvDesc: Upload a list of phone numbers

step2.noTags: No tags found. Create tags in Settings.
step2.noCustomFields: No custom fields defined. Create one in Settings → Custom Fields.
step2.selectTypeHint: Select an audience type to see the estimate.

step3.title: Personalize Message
step3.subtitle: Map template variables to contact fields, custom fields, or static values.
step3.noVariables: This template has no variables to personalize.
step3.unmappedWarningPrefix: Map every placeholder before continuing — still missing
step3.unmappedWarningSuffix: . Otherwise those placeholders will ship to Meta as empty strings.

step4.title: Review & Send
step4.subtitle: Name your broadcast, review the details, and send.
step4.pickFutureDate: Pick a future date and time.
step4.confirmSendDescPrefix: You are about to send this broadcast to
step4.confirmSendDescSuffix: template. This action cannot be undone.
